# XCSourceEditorCommandDefinitionKey

**Structure**

A key in the dictionary that defines a source editor command.

## Declaration

```swift
struct XCSourceEditorCommandDefinitionKey
```

## Overview

Source editor commands are defined via an array of dictionaries under the `XCSourceEditorCommandDefinitions` key of a Xcode Source Editor Extension’s `NSExtensionAttributes` within its `Info.plist` file. Commands can also be specified via the [doc://com.apple.xcodekit/documentation/XcodeKit/XCSourceEditorExtension/commandDefinitions] property in an extension’s conformance to the [doc://com.apple.xcodekit/documentation/XcodeKit/XCSourceEditorExtension] protocol.

## Populating a Command Definition Dictionary

- **classNameKey**: The class of the source editor command, in its attributes.
- **identifierKey**: The identifier of the source editor command in its attributes.
- **nameKey**: The name of the source editor command in its attributes.

## Creating a Key Using a Raw String

- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates the key for a source-editor command by using the string value you specify.

## Type Properties

- **systemSymbolNameKey**: An SF Symbol from the system associated with the command.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
